hero-block.hero.title: The Preferred Masterplan
hero-block.hero.lead: Our vision for a transformed Heathrow — 21 components set out in a comprehensive masterplan for a world-class three-runway airport that works for the whole of the UK.

stats-band.divergence: masterplan page has no numeric stats; template stats-band used with key masterplan facts instead

stats-band.stat-2.label: Phases of construction

case.case.title: More than just a runway
case.tl-1..tl-4: Four phases: Phase 1 Early Works 2021–2026, Phase 2 Runway Opens 2026–2030, Phase 3 Additional Capacity 2030–2035, Phase 4 Full Build-Out ~2050

sections.sections.eyebrow: What we are proposing to build
sections.sections.title: 21 components

respond.respond.title: Tell us what you think
respond.respond.body: Questions 1–5 in the questionnaire relate to the masterplan.

divergenceNotes: No numeric stats band on source page — template stats-band populated with masterplan key facts (21 components, 4 phases, 2050 build-out)
components section has 21 items — mapped to 4 representative cards in sections block
phases section (4 items) maps cleanly to tl-1..tl-4 (only 4 used of 5 template slots)
cta section is a page-navigation band, not a respond form — re-mapped to respond block
